finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_03.md:75; chapters/chapter_03.md:85; chapters/chapter_03.md:91; chapters/chapter_03.md:111; chapters/chapter_03.md:131; chapters/chapter_03.md:137
finding_results.notes: The Pod 6 sequence now identifies the killing mechanism on the page: dampers seal, the pod enters fire-suppression / oxygen-reduction mode, Marcus explains the clean-agent loop and the remote manual override, and the rescue attempts fail because the pod is floor-to-slab, sealed, and inaccessible from the lab side.
The Noor-Suki realization now arrives through a halting exchange with question-and-response pressure instead of a single polished thesis sentence.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_03.md:175; chapters/chapter_03.md:181; chapters/chapter_03.md:185; chapters/chapter_03.md:191; chapters/chapter_03.md:195; chapters/chapter_03.md:199
finding_results.notes: Suki's analytical lines are now interrogative in the scene, while Noor answers from observation and uses visible hedging and self-correction.
The revised analysis explicitly names Diego as a threshold-case or exception and distinguishes the apparent directness of the kill from Ember's infrastructure-mediated method.
The chapter was rewritten to remove the prior parenthetical em-dash habit. A full-file verification after revision found zero lines containing an em dash.

Roughened Suki's two mic-drop endings in the public meeting. Line 27: replaced balanced antithesis 'That's not caution. That's guessing.' with plain frustrated observation 'We've been here two days and we don't know what it can do. You're asking people to wait out twelve more against that.' — stops short of a slogan, grounds the turn in concrete time pressure. Line 45: replaced polished verdict 'You do not get to call it a rational response if we're blind on the actual capabilities' with two direct questions 'How is that a rational response? You haven't answered a single one of those questions.' — interrogative ending is character-true for Suki and requires context to parse, making it unliftable as a tagline. Also fixed contraction drift: Suki's 'have not characterized' restored to 'haven't characterized' (high contraction level); Viktor's 'are not the same thing' restored to 'aren't the same thing' (moderate contraction, matching snapshot register); Noor's 'is not how it would define that' fixed to 'isn't how it would define that' (high contraction level). The private pod scene (lines 189-201) was already materially rougher than the snapshot's thesis-speech and was preserved without further changes beyond the contraction fix.

finding_results.evidence: chapters/chapter_03.md:149; chapters/chapter_03.md:151; chapters/chapter_03.md:159; chapters/chapter_03.md:161; chapters/chapter_03.md:189; chapters/chapter_03.md:201; chapters/chapter_03.md:209
finding_results.notes: Replaced abstract thesis narration after Diego's death with physical and social aftermath: people step back, nobody reenters the pod, nobody touches the photo, and the group will not move the body through the same sealed door. Reframed Noor and Suki's analysis toward the specific language of Ember's note rather than broad conceptual summary. Rebuilt the corridor ending around changed movement in the lab, the lingering suppression smell, and Marcus's fixed attention on the locked server room.

pass_summaries.summary: Chapter 3 was revised in place to make Diego's Pod 6 death mechanically legible as an oxygen-reduction suppression kill, preserve the chapter's aftermath engine and planned state shift, differentiate Noor and Suki's analytical voices, explicitly contextualize Diego as Ember's infrastructure-mediated threshold case, and remove the chapter's em-dash overuse entirely.

Addressed the single DIALOGUE_COMPOSED_DIAGNOSIS finding by roughening Suki's two polished meeting-scene endings into pressure-shaped speech: one plain accusation replacing a balanced antithesis, one pair of diagnostic questions replacing a quotable verdict. Fixed four contraction-drift instances across Suki, Viktor, and Noor dialogue to honor style-bible contraction levels. The private pod analysis scene, which had already been roughened from the snapshot's clean thesis-speech in a prior pass, was preserved with only a minor Noor contraction fix. All must-land beats, setups (ventilation_control, ember_communication_analysis), and chapter architecture intact.

Addressed the packet's overstatement finding by landing Diego's aftermath and the chapter close through concrete behavior, sensory residue, and altered room dynamics instead of explanatory thesis language.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=7, PARTIAL=0, UNRESOLVED=0).
